description: The Heritage Skills equivalent of Eagle Scout: recognition for learners who have demonstrated mastery across multiple badge paths and completed a community documentation project.

criteria.keeperBadgesDescription: Earn Keeper-tier badges in at least 3 different badge paths
criteria.heritageBookDescription: Complete and submit a Heritage Book project with at least one community-reviewed chapter
criteria.neighborsBadgeDescription: Earn at least the Apprentice tier in the Neighbors path — social intelligence is not optional for Heritage Keeper recognition
criteria.teachItDescription: Complete at least one teach-it verification at Keeper level (evaluated by an instructor or Keeper-tier peer)

recognition.title: Heritage Keeper
recognition.description: A Heritage Keeper has demonstrated they can teach heritage skills, document heritage knowledge, and understand the social fabric of the communities that created these practices.
recognition.foxfireParallel: The Foxfire standard: you know it when you can teach it. The Heritage Keeper has met that standard across multiple traditions.
